commit_message: VCU118 F1Shim Fix VCU118 F1Shim Fix Firesim's F1Shim port names have changed, the instantiation of the F1Shim module uses outdated names and errors out in synthesis. This PR updates module instantiation port names.

examples.commit_message: VCU118 F1Shim Fix VCU118 F1Shim Fix Firesim's F1Shim port names have changed, the instantiation of the F1Shim module uses outdated names and errors out in synthesis. This PR updates module instantiation port names.
